name: Lemon Meringue Roulade
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp cornflour (corn starch - made from wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 13x9 swiss roll (jelly roll) tin with greaseproof or non-stick paper.
2. Preheat the oven to 300°F / 150°C.
3. Whisk egg whites until frothy, gradually adding sugar until stiff peaks form. Add cornflour last and mix until just combined.
4. Spoon the batter into the prepared tin and level the surface. Bake for 45 minutes until firm to the touch. Remove from the oven and cool uncovered.
5. Whip double cream and fold in lemon curd (homemade preferred).
6. Place a piece of greaseproof paper on the work surface and sprinkle with icing sugar.
7. Turn the baked meringue onto the paper, peeling off the parchment lining.
8. Spread the lemon curd and cream mixture over the meringue and roll up the log using the paper as assistance.
9. Allow to cool completely before serving cold or freezing for later use (freeze on a tray, then wrap in freezer-safe packaging).
Makes 6-8 servings.
